arts.ttl: Barcelona eyeing summer move for Premier League midfielder
arts.sum: Barcelona are expected to be relatively busy during the 2025 summer transfer window, which will be their first since returning to La Liga’s 1:1 rule. Reinforcements are wanted in defence and attack, although a new midfielder could also be on the agenda if Frenkie de Jong ends up leaving. De Jong has long been linked […] The post Barcelona eyeing summer move for Premier League midfielder appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick unconvinced by Deco answer to problem position
arts.sum: Barcelona have been looking for a long-term answer to their right-back woes for the best part of a decade, and while Jules Kounde appears to have convinced as an answer for now, the Blaugrana will once again go into the summer looking at right-backs as one of their priorities. However they are yet to settle […] The post Barcelona manager Hansi Flick unconvinced by Deco answer to problem position appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal's agent makes major Barcelona contract claim following Joan Laporta meeting
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal's agent Jorge Mendes provides a major update on his client's contract situation after holding a meeting with Barcelona president Joan Laporta.

arts.ttl: Liverpool rival Barcelona for Leao - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are considering a move for AC Milan forward Rafael Leao, Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez was blocked from leaving in January and Manchester City are targeting Leicester's teenage sensation Jeremy Monga.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Hansi Flick's side 'eyeing double raid' on Espanyol for highly-rated duo
arts.sum: Espanyol defender Omar El Hilali is reportedly of interest to Barcelona, with Hansi Flick's side bidding to bring in a new right-back this summer.

arts.ttl: Moving the Goalposts | How Cata Coll became the present and future of Barcelona and Spain in a year
arts.sum: Keeper suffered an ACL tear in 2022. Now she is first-choice for club and country and a World Cup and Olympic gold medal winner “Confident, risk-taker and big character,” Catalina “Cata” Coll says without hesitation when asked to describe herself as a player. The much-heralded promise of Barcelona and Spain has now become the present and the future and all it took was one summer. A dreadful ACL tear in February 2022 ended Coll’s season and, with that, her hope to become second-choice keeper, much less first. With Sandra Paños the undisputed choice in goal, Gemma Font had no competition in the second position she had already won. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Messi AND Neymar in SHOCK summer returns to Barcelona
arts.sum: Messi departed Barcelona in the summer of 2021 amidst a flood of tears, moving on a free transfer to PSG as it became evident that the Camp Nou club could no longer afford him. Now Messi, at the age of 37, is desperate to return to Barcelona, with the Catalan club seeking to complete a stunning deal that could see the Inter Miami attacker return for the opening of the renovated Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Marc-Andre ter Stegen offers update on Barcelona return
arts.sum: Marc-Andre ter Stegen has been sidelined since September with a severe knee injury.
